product.title: Fièra Luxury Concealer & Foundation with Anti-Aging Ingredients - Full Coverage for Dark Circles, Wrinkles, Fine Lines, and Spots, All-Day Wear For Mature Skin - Neutral Beige, 0.5 FL. OZ. / 15 ML
featureBullets: 2-In-1 Concealer - The only concealer designed for women over 40 that combines full makeup coverage with anti-aging skincare benefits. Offers all-day wear without caking or settling into fine lines. High-quality skincare ingredients visibly reduce signs of aging, promoting firmer, healthier, and brighter-looking skin over time.

Read This For Best Results - Use only 1/4 the amount of typical concealers, warm on fingers or a palette until it melts for flawless application. Use our shade selector tool to find your perfect match. For cold climates, keep the product warm before use, and visit our video section for a step-by-step tutorial.

Imperfections Gone - Conceals dark circles, under-eye bags, redness, age spots, and discoloration while powerful anti-aging ingredients like vitamins, hydrolyzed collagen, hyaluronic acid, and antioxidants restore a youthful look. Delivers both immediate coverage and long-term skincare benefits, leaving skin looking even, smooth and radiant.

Formulated for Mature Skin - Designed for 40+ skin, this anti-aging skincare solution visibly reduces dryness, dark spots, and wrinkles with scientifically proven ingredients. It's designed to hydrate, restore, and revitalize while being cruelty-free, paraben-free, and GMO-free for a safe and effective skincare routine.

Trusted by Over a Million Customers - Join the millions of women globally who trust our brand for skincare that works. Scientifically formulated for mature skin, our products help to boost hydration and elasticity while visibly diminishing the appearance of dark spots, redness, dark circles and wrinkles. Make us part of your skincare journey for radiant, youthful results.

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the concealer provides great coverage, particularly for dark circles, and appreciate its easy application that requires only a small amount. The texture receives mixed feedback - while some find it smooth and not heavy on the skin, others note it's not very creamy. Moreover, the moisturizing properties are also mixed, with some saying it enhances wrinkles while others find it not moisturizing at all. Additionally, the color match receives mixed reviews, with some saying it matches their skin while others find it too dark, and the natural appearance varies between a lovely matte finish and a shiny/greasy look.

reviews.reviewText: Oh wow! I am in love with this Fiera Concealer! It is amazing! The best concealer/ foundation I've ever used. I didn't have any issues with the consistency or the application. I squeezed out a little onto the back of my hand, used my finger to rub it around a little bit to warm it up. Then used that same finger to dab under my eyes and on any spots I wanted to conceal. I used an angled foundation brush (Kat VonD's D35 concealer brush)to blend it. Then I dabbed the product all over my face and used a foundation brush (Il Makiage foundation brush) to blend. It was as easy to blend as any other liquid foundation I've used. I was in awe of the coverage and absolutely adore the dewy, glowy finish it leaves. The concealer is not heavy at all, you forget you even have it on. Today was the second time I've worn it and I was in the sun all afternoon. It wasn't super hot, but it was pretty warm in the sun, so i was a bit sweaty. Chasing after my 8 year old little boy at a festival in our town. My makeup is still in place now, at almost 10pm. It may not look as flawless as it did when I applied it this morning, but thats just because my mascara is smeared and my lip color is gone. But my foundation? Still there and still covering! I am simply amazed by this stuff! I have really dark circles under my eyes, I always have. This concealer doesn't completely cover my dark circles, but it makes more of an impact than any other makeup ever has. I also have some redness on my cheeks that I color correct before putting on my foundation. With just about every other concealer and/ or foundation I've ever used, my redness will start peeking thru within a couple of hours. But this concealer has kept my redness covered thru heat, sweat, and thru the day. One more issue I've always encountered with every concealer I've used is it settles into my fine lines, especially on the inside corners of my eyes. Now, I'm not gonna hype up a product that doesn't live up to it. This concealer did settle very faintly, very lightly. But not nearly as badly as other concealer do. I just lightly tapped the area with my ring finger and it no longer looked settled. I am 44,I have tried A LOT of different foundations and concealers over the years, from drugstore brands to high end labels. Trust me when I tell you that this is the best of the best! You need this concealer. It will change your life!! One thing I will say is that i may have to start carrying a compact of powder again, especially in warmer weather. I did look a little oily about an hour after applying my makeup. But I'm not too concerned about that right now since we're going into fall and winter. That will not be a problem for me in the cold weather. Anyway, yes, I recommend this and I will be purchasing again, for sure. Oh yeah, I got the natural beige color and it's perfect for me! Absolutely love it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 12, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Good coverage, blends easily, very concentrated,
reviews.reviewText: LOVE this product. Don't believe any review that says its hard to apply. Goes on silky and creamy and leaves a bit of a glow. Not matte and not yellowish at all which is a problem I find in a lot of concealers. Ordered the neutral beige and it blends in beautifully. So well that you don't necessarily have to use it all over if you don't want to. Some days at home I just apply a little under my eyes. A TINY bit goes a long way so be careful when squeezing the tube. If you go too hard you'll get way more than you need and there's no way to save it. I think the coverage is just right for a natural look and evening out skin tone, but if you have dark spotting or blemishes you might need a bit of heavier concealer in that spot. Definitely does not settle into fine lines like so many do and lasts all day. Highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 17, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I would never have thought this would be good if someone had described it to me. Takes very little and it's fairly thick, almost greasy and stays that consistency (doesn't dry)... but somehow it stays in places and doesn't gather to look yucky! Sand (color) matches my skin well and keeps my undereye circles concealed better than anything else I have tried. Never "good enough" to please me, you know how us girls are! :) A bit pricey, but I think it is going to last me about 18 months, so not bad.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Disappointed with under eye dark circle coverage
reviews.reviewText: With all the hype that I had read, videos I had seen, and many rave reviews, I was expecting a miracle-working under eye concealer. With my very dark under eye circles, I'm always looking for that Holy Grail of products. Sad to say, the Fiera Luxury Concealer didn't perform as hoped for. I had no problem with the consistency - I followed the instructions and warmed it up between my fingers first. I used very little, and a little does go a long way. Application was not a problem. I used a beauty blender. But the coverage was no better than any other concealers that I've tried. In comparison, Laura Geller's Seamless Finish Full Coverage Concealer continues to outperform any other under eye concealers I have tried. It is also a creamy concealer, but does a great job of covering my dark circles. It will remain my go to product in that category. For reference, I am a 72-year young woman with combination skin, fine lines and wrinkles, but no deep lines or wrinkles. I applied an eye primer as usual before applying the Fiera concealer.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 9, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage!! I warm the tube in hot water in a cup. Goes on Great with brush. Does not crease in lines
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is the only concealer I have found to cover my dark circles and blemishes. It is so smooth and light feeling on my face.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Creamy moisturizing formula goes on smooth without tugging. Helps to use a makeup brush. It blends well with my skin color/tone and stays on all day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Covered my dark circles. Matched my skin perfectly. Has an amazing luminous finish. This is all I wear over my skincare. Constantly get compliments on my skin and my facial highlights. I don’t use a highlighter. This product is just that great! Does not settle into my fine lines. Very thick but blends easy. You only need a tiny tiny bit.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 15, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This product arrived on time and was wellpackaged. The contents was rather thick, but withot a smell. I had a good overall finish, which seems natural and blended in well into my skin. Will purchase again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on April 29, 2025

reviews.reviewText: i saw an ad for this concealer, and although I thought it was a little expensive for such a small tube, I decided to try it. Boy was I ever surprised how amazing it is!! That little tube is like ‘gold for the skin’. Squeeze a small amount onto your finger, anpply and watch how flawless your skin becomes! It literally seems to melt into a luxurious cream and it never (ever) creates ‘crease lines’ or caked on look. What it does is, makes pours and fine lines disappear. It’s so light on the skin, it just feels like my skin glows. How I use it, I use a vitamin C moisturizer together with my shade of Fièra. I squeeze a tiny bit of my Fièra (bisque is my colour) into a bit of vitamin C, then I blend them together and apply to my face/neck area. I apply a tiny bit more of just the concealer to areas that need a ‘little bit more’ like to a spot or any uneven colour on my face. A girl I work with told me my “face looked perfect! As though airbrushed” lol! I seriously get compliments EVERY time I wear it! ** I am not a paid or solicited review. I am just a gal who won’t use any other foundation or concealer now that I’ve found this one. PS: 1 tube last me about 2 months (or more). It is so worth the price (and so am I!). I highly recommend this product… it does EXACTLY watch it claims to do.

reviews.reviewTitle: Amazing coverage and feels good on the skin. Dewy effect!
reviews.reviewText: This stuff is amazing. Blends well with your skin, leaves a dewy glow. Never dries your skin out, in fact it almost moisturizes as you wear it. You can use this as your foundation, the coverage is that good!. I won't buy anything else.

reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on November 16, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I would give an overall high rating to this concealer because of its durability and strong coverage over rosacea redness. I often use it as my only skin coverage in areas of darkness under eyes and telangiectasia around the cheeks and nose. It helps to not have to use a full face of makeup as I have sensitive skin and don’t like a heavy foundation. The downside, however is that it is very oil based and so I noticed it was causing flares of my hormonal chin acne that stopped when I avoided application in these areas. Nevertheless, great for application in desired areas of concern.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on September 30, 2024
